title: Lifecycle: persons append cycles, reopen, lookup
description: Lifecycle growth experiment. It starts from a clean persons dataset, appends several large batches, reopens after each batch, validates point lookup, and tracks artifact growth.

dataset.notes: Synthetic persons(id,name,age) dataset for controlled storage-engine measurement.

workload.notes: Initial load/build, then for each cycle: append batch, close/reopen or refresh, run deterministic random point lookup sample, and record artifact growth.

fault.notes: No fault injection in this executable catalog experiment.

fairness.notes: Targets should use equivalent durable persisted semantics.

runs.notes: Default local profile. CLI may override.
